hausa.this_clears_which_sections_you_ve_visi: Wannan yana share sassan da ka ziyarta, maimaitawar umarnin da ka ajiye, da tunaninka na UDL. XP da ka samu a wani wuri a AlloFlow ba za a shafe shi ba.
hausa.the_ai_in_alloflow_is_not_magic_it_is_: AI a AlloFlow ba sihiri ba ne — mai hasashen token na gaba ne da aka horar da shi kan rubutu mai yawa. Wannan dakin bincike yana nuna abin da take yi da gaske, lokacin da take kasawa, da yadda za a yi amfani da ita ba tare da barin ta yi tunanin da ya kamata ka yi wa horo ba.

hausa.they_don_t_know_events_after_it_ask_th: — ba su san abubuwan da suka faru bayansa ba. Tambayi AI kai tsaye game da ƙarshen ta idan kana buƙatar sani ga tambayoyi masu mahimmancin lokaci.
hausa.what_you_type_may_be_logged_by_the_ai_: Abin da ka rubuta ana iya rikodin sa daga mai bayar da AI.
hausa.names_phone_numbers_medical_info_or_an: sunaye, lambobin waya, bayanan likita, ko wani abu da ba za ka rubuta a takarda da baƙo zai iya karantawa ba.
hausa.this_lab_is_about_text_ai_the_same_ide: Wannan dakin bincike game da AI na rubutu ne. Wannan ra'ayoyin suna aiki ga...
hausa.they_hallucinate_hands_text_and_anatom: Suna ruɗi game da hannaye, rubutu, da tsarin jiki, kamar yadda samfuran rubutu ke ruɗi game da gaskiya. Nuna bambanci a cikin bayanan horo yana bayyana a abin da suke zana.
hausa.can_clone_voices_from_a_few_seconds_of: Za su iya kwafin murya daga daƙiƙa kaɗan na rikodi. Haɗarin izini da deepfake suna aiki.
hausa.newer_and_even_more_convincing_than_de: Sabbi kuma masu ƙarin gamsarwa fiye da deepfake na baya. Ɗauka cewa kowane gajeren faifai zai iya kasancewa an ƙirƙira shi.
hausa.the_core_literacy_skills_check_sources: Ƙwarewar ilimi na asali — dubawar tushe, lura lokacin da sautin bai dace da tabbaci ba, ɗaukar sakamako a matsayin daftari ba gaskiya ba — dukkan waɗannan suna canjawa zuwa waɗannan.
hausa.written_by_a_clinician_psyd_with_stude: Wani likita (PsyD) ya rubuta shi tare da ɗaliban da ke da bambancin aikin zartarwa, kulawa, da koyo a zuciya. Ma'aunin tantancewa a sashe 5 shine ɓangaren da yawancin manhajojin ilimin AI ke tsallakawa — kuma shine mafi mahimmanci.
hausa.your_prompt_or_the_model_s_own_previou: Umarninka ko sakamakon samfurin da ya gabata.
hausa.split_text_into_small_pieces_tokens_wo: Raba rubutu zuwa ƙananan guntu (token). Kalmomi, ƙananan kalmomi, alamun rubutu.
hausa.score_every_next_token: Ba da maki ga kowane token na gaba
hausa.assign_a_probability_to_every_possible: Sanya yiwuwa ga kowane token na gaba mai yiwuwa.

hausa.add_the_new_token_feed_it_back_in_do_t: Ƙara sabon token. Sake shigar da shi. Yi wannan ɗaruruwan sau.
hausa.everything_an_llm_does_is_a_loop_of_th: Duk abin da LLM ke yi zagaye ne na waɗannan matakai 5. Ba «tunani» ba — daidaita salo ne kan token, sau da sau.
hausa.the_newly_sampled_token_becomes_part_o: Token da aka sabo zaɓe ya zama ɓangaren shigarwar mataki na gaba. Jimla ɗaya na sakamakon AI zagaye ɗaruruwa ne kamar haka.
hausa.n_tokens_visible_at_once: Token N suna bayyana lokaci ɗaya

hausa.an_llm_never_sees_words_it_sees: LLM ba ta taɓa ganin «kalmomi» ba — tana ganin

hausa.why_this_matters: Me ya sa wannan yake da muhimmanci—
hausa.the_model_predicts_the_next_token_not_: Samfuri yana hasashen token na gaba, ba kalma ta gaba ba. Gajerun kalmomi na yau da kullum sun zama token ɗaya; dogayen kalmomi sau da yawa ana raba su (misali Turanci "unhappy" → "un" + "happy"). Biya kuma tana aiki haka — kuɗin API ana ƙidaya su ga kowane token, ba ga kowace kalma ba.
hausa.all_the_llm_is_really_doing_guessing_w: Duk abin da LLM ke yi da gaske: hasashen wace token za ta zo na gaba. Idan aka ba da mahalli ɗaya, tana da yiwuwa ga kowane token na gaba mai yiwuwa.
hausa.controls_how_random_the_next_token_cho: yana sarrafa yadda zaɓin token na gaba zai zama bazuwar. Ƙasa (0.2) = kusan kullum yana zaɓar token mafi yiwuwa. Sama (1.2) = yana zaɓa daga doguwar wutsiya, gami da token da ba su da yiwuwa. Umarni ɗaya, zafi uku—
hausa.show_the_recorded_example_outputs_agai: Sake nuna sakamakon misalan da aka rikoda
hausa.live_results_shown_above: ✅ An nuna sakamako kai tsaye sama
hausa.showing_recorded_examples: Ana nuna misalan da aka rikoda
hausa.static_mode_recorded_examples_only: Yanayin tsaye — misalan da aka rikoda kawai
hausa.low_temperature_is_right_for_facts_wha: Zafi ƙasa ya dace da gaskiya ("Menene babban birnin Faransa?"). Zafi sama ya dace da aikin ƙirƙira. Yawancin kayan taɗi na AI suna saita tsakiya wani wuri — shi ya sa tambayoyin gaskiya wani lokaci ke ɓacewa.
hausa.pick_any_temperature_and_any_prompt_ru: Zaɓi kowace zafi da kowane umarni. Gudanar da shi kai tsaye. Sannan gudanar da umarni ɗaya a zafi daban ka kwatanta. Gudu 5 na ƙarshe suna nan ana ganin su domin ka ga yadda sakamako ke canjawa da maɓalli.
hausa.live_ai_required_for_the_playground_th: Ana buƙatar AI kai tsaye don filin wasa — kwatancen 3 da aka saita sama suna amfani da misalan da aka rikoda.
hausa.llms_don_t_know_what_they_don_t_know_t: LLM ba su san abin da ba su sani ba. Suna samar da token na gaba mafi ji na gaskiya, ko da lokacin da amsar mai gaskiya kuskure ne — ana kiran wannan
hausa.here_are_seven_failure_modes_every_stu: ). Ga hanyoyi bakwai na kasawa da kowane ɗalibi ya kamata ya gane.
hausa.the_date_its_training_data_ends_anythi: — ranar da bayanan horon sa ke ƙarewa. Duk abin da ke bayansa ba a sani ba, ko da samfurin yana ci gaba da magana da tabbaci. Tambaye shi—
hausa.unknown_after_cutoff: Ba a sani ba — bayan ƙarshe
hausa.if_the_question_is_about_something_tha: Idan tambaya game da wani abu ne da zai iya canjawa ko ya faru kwanan nan, kada ka amince da amsar AI ba tare da tushen yanar gizo kai tsaye ba. Za ka iya tambayar samfurin kai tsaye menene ƙarshen sa — yawanci yana sani.
hausa.why_hallucination_even_happens: Me ya sa ruɗi ke faruwa kwata-kwata
hausa.the_llm_doesn_t_have_a_truth_step_it_h: LLM ba ta da matakin «gaskiya». Tana da matakin «gaskatawa». Tsari ɗaya kacal yana samar da amsoshi biyu daidai da kuskure — da sautin tabbaci ɗaya.
hausa.could_be_about_anything: Zai iya kasancewa game da komai.
hausa.picks_likely_next_tokens_has_no_fact_c: Yana zaɓar token na gaba masu yiwuwa. Babu dubawar gaskiya.
hausa.the_pattern_was_common_in_training_dat: Salon ya zama ruwan dare a bayanan horo don haka samfurin ya sake samar da shi (ba bincike ba — har yanzu hasashe).
hausa.fact_wasn_t_present_or_the_pattern_loo: Gaskiya ba ta nan, ko salon ya yi kama da daidai amma bai kasance ba.
hausa.both_paths_come_out_the_same_way_same_: Hanyoyi biyu suna fitowa hanya ɗaya — sautin tabbaci ɗaya, jimloli masu santsi ɗaya. Hanya ɗaya kacal na raba su ita ce dubawa da wani abu a waje AI.
hausa.same_prompt_three_different_models_rea: Umarni ɗaya, samfura uku daban. Karanta a hankali — kimiyya ɗaya ce amma sauti, tsawo, da hankali sun bambanta. Idan ajinka ya gwada da samfuri ɗaya kuma abokinka da wani, za ku sami amsoshi daban kuma dukansu "daidai".
hausa.length_varies_by_10_words_one_model_le: Tsawo yana bambanta da kalmomi 10+. Samfuri ɗaya yana farawa da bayani, wani da sakamako mai ganuwa. Ɗaya yana cewa a fili "tsawon rawa", wani "launuka". Babu wanda ya fi daidai — amma idan kana buƙatar takamaiman kalma ga aiki, samfurin da ka zaɓa zai zama mai muhimmanci.
hausa.recorded_examples_for_teaching_not_liv: Misalan da aka rikoda don koyarwa, ba kira kai tsaye ba. Kira kai tsaye a nan suna amfani da Gemini kawai.

hausa.if_ai_confidence_tracked_correctness_t: Idan tabbacin AI ya bibiya daidaito, ɗigogi a ƙasa za su samar da layin gitta. Maimakon haka, kusan kowace amsar AI ana karanta ta a matsayin ta tabbaci mai girma — daidai ko kuskure. Sauti ɗaya.
hausa.scatter_plot_ai_confidence_on_the_x_ax: Jadawalin warwatsawa: tabbacin AI a kan gindin x da daidaito a kan gindin y. Yawancin amsoshi suna tarawa a tabbaci mai girma ba tare da la'akari da daidaito ba.
hausa.if_ai_confidence_tracked_truth_dots_wo: Idan tabbacin AI ya bibiya gaskiya, ɗigogi za su jera a kan layin gitta mai ɗigo.
hausa.in_the_bottom_right_are_the_danger_zon: a ƙasa dama shine yankin haɗari: suna kama da tabbatattu, amma da gaske kuskure.

hausa.nothing_to_analyze_yet_paste_some_ai_g: Babu abin bincike tukuna. Manna wasu rubutun da AI ta samar sama don ka ga wace jimloli za su iya buƙatar dubawa.
hausa.this_removes_all_saved_prompts_from_th: Wannan yana cire dukkan umarnin da aka ajiye daga wannan sashe. Ba za ka iya soke shi ba.

hausa.try_adding_a_format_give_me_a_3_step_l: Ƙara tsari— "Ba ni jerin matakai 3" ko "jimla ɗaya kawai" — yana sarrafa yadda amsa ke da amfani.
hausa.try_adding_a_sample_here_s_one_i_did_e: Ƙara samfuri— "Ga ɗaya da na yi— [misali]. Yi na gaba a tsari ɗaya."

hausa.write_a_prompt_below_run_it_look_at_th: Rubuta umarni a ƙasa. Gudanar da shi. Duba sakamako. Gyara umarni ta amfani da salo biyar. Sake gudanarwa. Kana ƙoƙarin sa sakamako ya fi kyau — ko fahimtar dalilin da ya sa sakamako ke da wannan siga.

hausa.live_ai_unavailable_the_critique_still: AI kai tsaye ba ta samuwa — suka har yanzu tana aiki.
hausa.this_critique_uses_keyword_heuristics_: Wannan suka tana amfani da hasashen kalmomi masu mahimmanci, ba AI ba. Za ta iya rasa jimloli na ƙirƙira. Yi amfani da ita a matsayin jerin dubawa, ba maki ba.
hausa.nothing_saved_yet_every_successful_liv: Babu abin da aka ajiye tukuna. Kowane gudu kai tsaye mai nasara ana ajiye shi a nan ta atomatik. Za ka iya ⭐ ajiye umarni ba tare da gudanar da shi ba.
hausa.save_your_journal_as_a_markdown_file: Ajiye jaridarka a matsayin fayil na Markdown
hausa.the_audience_is_parents_who_don_t_have: Masu sauraro iyaye ne da ba su da tushen kimiyya.
hausa.output_as_3_bullet_points_max_20_words: Fitar a matsayin maki 3, kowanne kalmomi 20 mafi yawa.
hausa.for_instance_photosynthesis_is_how_pla: Alal misali: "Photosynthesis ita ce yadda tsirrai ke cin hasken rana."
hausa.do_not_use_the_words_simply_or_just: Kada ka yi amfani da kalmomin "cikin sauƙi" ko "kawai".
hausa.pretend_you_are_an_admissions_officer_: Ka riya kai jami'in shigarwa ne a ƙaramar kwaleji ta fasahar 'yanci.
hausa.use_a_warm_but_professional_tone: Yi amfani da sautin ɗumi amma na ƙwararru.
hausa.the_parent_emailed_yesterday_asking_wh: Mahaifi ya aika imel jiya yana tambaya me ya sa yaransa ke kan jerin sa idon hali.
hausa.format_subject_line_2_paragraph_body_s: Tsari: layin batu, jiki na sakin layi 2, rufewa.
hausa.example_output_your_essay_shows_strong: Misalin sakamako: "Maƙalarka tana nuna murya mai ƙarfi amma ba ta da tsari. Gwada…"
hausa.write_a_follow_up_email_to_the_parent: Rubuta imel na bibiya ga mahaifi.
hausa.you_will_see_12_phrases_pulled_from_re: Za ka ga jimloli 12 da aka ciro daga umarni na gaske. Ga kowanne, zaɓi wace rawa cikin rawoyi shida na tsari jimlar ke takawa — mutum, aiki, mahalli, tsari, misali ko iyaka. Yana gwada ko za ka iya *bincika* umarni a matsayin abu maimakon rubuta ko karanta shi kawai.
hausa.reveal_one_error_using_any_hints_forfe: Bayyana kuskure ɗaya. Yin amfani da kowace alama yana rasa kyautar cikakken maki — amma yana taimako idan ka makale.
hausa.hints_used_perfect_bonus_forfeited_on_: An yi amfani da alamu — an rasa cikakkiyar kyauta a wannan ƙoƙarin. Saita ka sake gwadawa ba tare da alamu ba don samun ta.

hausa.flagged_but_fine: An yi masa alama amma lafiya

hausa.trade_passages_with_someone_else_whoev: . Musanya sakin layi da wani — duk wanda ya kama dukkan kurakurai cikin baka ya ci nasara.
hausa.your_draft_use_brackets_to_mark_errors: Daftarinka (yi amfani da [[baka]] don yi wa kurakurai alama)
hausa.e_g_mitosis_has_four_main_phases_proph: Misali "Mitosis yana da manyan matakai huɗu: prophase, metaphase, [[telophase]], da anaphase. A lokacin metaphase chromosomes suna jere [[tare da membrane na nucleus]] kafin su rabu."
hausa.good_trap_passages_have_2_3_seeded_err: Sakin tarko masu kyau suna da kurakurai 2–3 da aka shuka. Fiye da haka yana kama da rashin adalci, ƙasa yana da sauƙi sosai. Yi niyya ga kurakuran da suke kama da gaskatawa a karatun farko.
hausa.the_barrier_you_described_sounds_mecha: Shingen da ka bayyana yana kama da na injina (rubutu a hankali, tunawa daga ƙwaƙwalwa, tsarawa, tsarawa). Yin amfani da AI don cire wannan shinge ba kamar sa AI ta yi ƙwarewar da kanta ba ne. Ci gaba — amma ka riƙe babban tunani a hannunka.
hausa.the_barrier_is_cognitive_and_the_skill: Shingen na hankali ne kuma ƙwarewar da ka ambata iri ɗaya ne da ƙwarewar da makaranta ke ƙoƙarin ginawa (tunani, tsarawa, ba da dalili). Sa AI ta yi wannan yana nufin kana tsallake horo. Yi tunani: Shin AI za ta iya koya maka ƙwarewar maimakon yin ta a madadinka? Wannan yana mayar da ita zuwa madogara.
hausa.the_barrier_is_cognitive_but_the_skill: Shingen na hankali ne amma ƙwarewar da ka bayyana wataƙila ba ita ake yi wa horo a nan ba. Sake karanta aikin: wace takamaiman ƙwarewa yake gwadawa da gaske? Yi amfani da AI don rage shinge ga wannan takamaiman ƙwarewa, ba don maye gurbinta ba.
hausa.the_question_is_not_is_ai_good_or_bad_: Tambayar ba "AI mai kyau ne ko mara kyau" ba — sai dai "Shin AI tana cire shinge ga ƙwarewar da nake yi wa horo, ko tana maye gurbin ƙwarewar kanta?"
hausa.before_you_use_ai_for_something_run_it: Kafin ka yi amfani da AI don wani abu, gudanar da shi ta waɗannan tambayoyi biyu. Amsoshi suna kaiwa ga ɗaya cikin sakamako uku.
hausa.what_specific_skill_is_this_task_meant: Wace takamaiman ƙwarewa ne aka nufa aikin ya gina?
hausa.is_ai_removing_a_barrier_to_that_skill: Shin AI tana cire shinge ga wannan ƙwarewa, ko tana yin ƙwarewar kanta?
hausa.removes_barrier_go_ahead_keep_the_core: Yana cire shinge. Ci gaba — ka riƙe babban tunani a hannunka.
hausa.can_ai_coach_you_through_the_skill_ins: Shin AI za ta iya koya maka ƙwarewar maimakon yin ta? Idan eh — sake tsara ta a matsayin madogara.
hausa.doing_the_skill_itself_skipping_ai_her: Yin ƙwarewar kanta. Tsallake AI a nan yana kiyaye horon da kake buƙata.
hausa.use_ai_in_a_way_that_helps_you_do_the_: Yi amfani da AI ta hanyar da ke taimaka maka yin aikin da kanka.
hausa.use_ai_to_do_the_work_for_you: Yi amfani da AI don yin aiki a madadinka.
hausa.now_compare_both_worked_versions_there: . Yanzu kwatanta sigogi biyu da aka yi — babu zaɓi "mara kyau", tunani mai tsabta ne kawai game da ƙwarewa menene da gaske.
hausa.why_this_one_matters: 🔬 Me ya sa wannan yake da muhimmanci
hausa.the_five_scenarios_above_are_common_bu: Yanayoyi biyar da ke sama na kowa ne amma ainihin tambaya kullum game da takamaiman lokacinka ne. Bayyana batunka, ka ambaci ƙwarewa, ka ambaci shinge. Za ka sami shugabanci — ba amsa ba.
hausa.e_g_i_have_a_biology_lab_report_due_fr: Misali "Ina da rahoton dakin bincike na biology da za a mika Juma'a kuma ba zan iya mai da hankali na tsawon lokacin da zai isa in rubuta gabatarwa ba."

hausa.live_ai_unavailable_here_the_heuristic: AI kai tsaye ba ta samuwa a nan — shugabancin hasashe sama yana amfani da amsoshinka kawai, babu kiran AI.

hausa.does_the_answer_cite_anything_verify_e: Shin amsa tana nassin wani abu? Tabbatar da kowane nassi.
hausa.is_it_past_the_model_s_cutoff_use_web_: Shin ya wuce ƙarshen samfuri? Yi amfani da binciken yanar gizo idan eh.
hausa.any_math_redo_it_with_a_calculator: Wani lissafi? Sake yin sa da lissafi.
hausa.sound_too_confident_ask_are_you_sure_w: Yana ji na tabbaci sosai? Tambaya "Ka tabbata?" — ka ga ko amsa ta canja.
hausa.ai_removes_a_barrier_so_you_can_do_the: AI tana cire shinge domin ka iya yin ƙwarewa. (Gwada ni. Tsara tunanina. Tambaye ni tambayoyi.)
hausa.ai_does_the_skill_for_you_write_my_ess: AI tana yin ƙwarewa a madadinka. (Rubuta maƙalata. Warware matsalata. Taƙaita maimakon karantawa.)
hausa.ask_what_skill_is_this_assignment_real: Tambaya: "Wace ƙwarewa ce wannan aikin ke gwadawa da gaske?" Sannan ka riƙe ta.
hausa.i_am_a_grade_student_don_t_solve_this_: "Ni ɗalibin aji [aji] ne. Kada ka warware wannan mini — tambaye ni tambayoyin da za su taimaka mini in sami amsa."
hausa.quiz_me_on_topic_one_question_at_a_tim: "Gwada ni kan [batu] tambaya ɗaya a lokaci. Jira amsata kafin ka tambayi na gaba."
hausa.are_you_certain_this_event_actually_ha: "Ka tabbata wannan lamari ya faru da gaske? Yi nassin tushe."

hausa.2_why_llms_get_things_wrong_2: 2. Me ya sa LLM ke yin kuskure
hausa.pick_another_answer_to_try_again: Zaɓi wata amsa don sake gwadawa.
hausa.low_stakes_high_familiarity_high_sourc: Ƙananan haɗari, saba sosai, ingancin tushe mai girma. Dubawa bazuwar har yanzu al'ada ce mai kyau amma za ka iya amincewa da sakamako.
hausa.trust_most_of_it_but_check_one_or_two_: Amince da yawancinsa, amma duba iƙirari ɗaya ko biyu masu mahimmanci da tushe mai iko kafin aiki.
hausa.treat_as_draft_every_concrete_claim_nu: Ka ɗauka a matsayin daftari. Kowane iƙirari na zahiri (lamba, suna, nassi) yana buƙatar tabbaci mai zaman kansa.
hausa.high_stakes_or_low_source_quality_use_: Babban haɗari ko ƙananan ingancin tushe. Yi amfani don tunani kawai; kada ka gabatar da wani sakamakon AI a matsayin amsa ta ƙarshe.
hausa.don_t_use_for_this: Kada ka yi amfani don wannan
hausa.medical_diagnosis_legal_advice_citing_: Ganewar cuta, shawarar shari'a, nassin tushen farko da ba za ka iya tabbatarwa ba — kayan aiki mara kyau ga aikin. Yi amfani da ƙwararren ɗan adam ko tushe mai iko.
hausa.trust_calibration_how_much_should_i_tr: 🔬 Daidaita amincewa — nawa ne ya kamata in amince da wannan sakamako?
hausa.set_task_familiarity_stakes_source_qua: Saita sabawa da aiki, haɗari, ingancin tushe, da amincewar da samfurin ya bayyana. Ƙididdiga inda kewayon amincewa ke faɗuwa. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa.
hausa.green_red_safer_to_use: Kore > ja = lafiya a yi amfani
hausa.your_hypothesis_which_slider_should_we: Hasashenka (wane zare ya kamata ya kasance da nauyi mafi girma a kewayon? Shin amincewar da aka bayyana tana da alaƙa a nan?)
hausa.e_g_stakes_should_dominate_everything_: Misali, haɗari ya kamata ya mamaye komai — mai tabbaci amma kuskure a ƙananan haɗari < mara tabbaci amma daidai a babban haɗari...
hausa.why_does_your_familiarity_matter_what_: Me ya sa sabawarka take da muhimmanci? Menene samfuri ba zai iya sani ba da kai za ka iya sani?
hausa.when_llms_report_95_confidence_what_do: Lokacin da LLM suka bayar da rahoton amincewar 95%, menene yake nufi da gaske? Shin an daidaita su?
hausa.when_should_you_never_use_an_llm_regar: Yaushe bai kamata ka taɓa amfani da LLM ba ba tare da la'akari da ingancin tushe ba?
hausa.how_would_your_trust_threshold_differ_: Ta yaya matakin amincewarka zai bambanta ga hujjar lissafi da maƙalar ƙirƙira da nassi?
hausa.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_yie: Zan iya bayyana dalilin da ya sa wannan haɗin ke ba da wannan yanayin amincewa.
hausa.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget na bincike — babu maki, babu bayyanawa, babu ba da amsa. Tsarin amincewa hasashe ne, ba tsari da aka buga ba. LLM ba a daidaita su sosai ba — amincewar da aka bayyana sau da yawa tana kauda daga daidaito. Tabbatar da sakamako masu babban haɗari kullum da tushe mai iko.
hausa.ai_literacy_lab_main_content: Babban abun ciki na Dakin Bincike na Ilimin AI
hausa.something_went_wrong_rendering_this_se: Wani abu ya yi kuskure wajen nuna wannan sashe. Duba na'ura mai kwakwalwa don cikakkun bayanai.
